description: Replace the aging UPS in the server room that protects the EMR and practice-management servers. Existing batteries no longer hold runtime. Swap to a new rack UPS during an after-hours window. Requested by Marcus Bell.

Upgrade the clinic firewall/router to a current model with adequate throughput and QoS for voice traffic. Improves VoIP call quality and guest-network handling. Schedule a brief maintenance window. Requested by Marcus Bell.

Replace the failing HVAC compressor on the treatment-wing rooftop unit that has been short-cycling and leaving rooms too cold. Coordinate with the clinic so affected rooms are vacated during the swap. Requested by Paul Devine.
short_description: Replace failing HVAC compressor in treatment wing

description: Roll out the rebuilt EMR workstation image with the corrected graphics driver to the charting stations, to resolve the boot failures. Stage and test on one machine before pushing to the rest. Requested by Marcus Bell.

Add two access points in the PT gym / rehab floor to fix WiFi dead spots and tablet drops. Mount, cable, and add to the controller. Brief gym WiFi interruption expected during cutover. Requested by Marcus Bell.
short_description: Add access points in PT gym

description: Replace the hydraulic units on the two treatment tables that are no longer holding pressure. Vendor to rebuild or swap the hydraulic assemblies. Schedule so the rooms are only down briefly. Requested by Shannon Perry.

Scheduled preventive maintenance on the instrument autoclave, including gasket replacement and a calibration check, to stop the recurring cycle alarms. Perform before clinic opens. Requested by Anita Lawson.

Replace the aging core network switch in the server room that the front office and clinical VLANs depend on. Pre-stage config and cut over after hours to minimize disruption. Requested by Marcus Bell.

After-hours patch and reboot window for the practice-management server to apply pending OS and database updates. Confirm a verified backup beforehand and validate the application after patching. Requested by Marcus Bell.
short_description: After-hours patch window for practice-management server

description: Upgrade the badge-system door controller firmware to the vendor's fixed release to resolve the recurring reader dropouts, with a rollback plan if the readers misbehave. Requested by Paul Devine.

Increase the clinic's internet uplink bandwidth and enable QoS for voice to fix VoIP jitter and dropped calls at the front desk. Coordinate provisioning with the ISP and cut over after hours. Requested by Marcus Bell.
short_description: Upgrade internet uplink and enable voice QoS

description: Replace the ice machine used for cold-therapy packs with a new unit and re-run the supply and drain lines correctly to stop the recurring leak. Requested by Paul Devine.
Deploy the updated check-in kiosk application build to resolve the lobby kiosk freezes and add an automatic nightly restart. Test on the spare kiosk first. Requested by Monica Vance.
Convert the back parking-lot pole fixtures to LED heads with new photocells to stop the recurring dusk failures and improve lot lighting for evening patients. Requested by Paul Devine.
Install a dedicated mini-split cooling unit for the server room to resolve the recurring high-temperature alarms, sized for the current equipment heat load. Requested by Marcus Bell.

Move the front-desk printer and the chart-label printer to direct IP print queues and replace the worn label-printer feed roller to stop the recurring offline and jam issues. Requested by Monica Vance.
short_description: Reconfigure front-desk printers to direct IP

description: Provision an EMR account and configure two clinical tablets for the new per-diem PT joining the rehab team, including badge access to the clinical area. Requested by Shannon Perry.
short_description: Provision EMR access and tablets for new PT

description: Replace the ultrasound therapy unit transducer head and power board on the unit that keeps faulting mid-treatment, then run a full output verification before returning it to service. Requested by Anita Lawson.
Reconfigure the VoIP system to add an auto-attendant and additional front-desk lines, and apply the new QoS settings, after the uplink upgrade is complete. Requested by Monica Vance.
Replace the failing speed/safety sensor and drive belt on the rehab-gym treadmill that keeps faulting, then calibrate and test before returning it to patient use. Requested by Shannon Perry.
